title: V8 Sandbox Bypass: AAW/PC control via DebugBreakTrampoline
bounty_rationale: V8 sandbox escape with PC control
description_snippet:
### VULNERABILITY DETAILS

#### Details

It's possible to tail call into any builtin from DebugBreakTrampoline regardless of linkage, allowing an attacker to escape the sandbox.

The crux of the issue can be seen in [DebugBreakTrampoline](https://source.chromium.org/chromium/chromium/src/+/main:v8/s
